\tzpentry{ID5739}{Split Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5739 introduces Split Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \begin{split} \mathbf{A}_{total}(\mathbf{r},t) &= \underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \times \mathbf{r}}{r^3}}_{\text{Dipole}} + \underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\int_V \frac{\mathbf{J}_{gyro}(\mathbf{r}',t)}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}d^3r'}_{\text{Gyroscopic current}} \\ &\quad + \underbrace{A_{tunnel}}_{\text{Quantum}} + \underbrace{A_{photon}}_{\text{Helical entanglement}} \end{split} \end{equation}
